Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 268 

VALUES: 000 = Not applicable 
001 = SSI 
002 = SSI eligible spouse 
003 = SSI pending a final determination of disposal of resources exceeding SSI dollar limits 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown
